title: Smoked Salmon Orzo Pilaf
description: A flavorful and healthy orzo pilaf dish featuring smoked salmon, topped with a squeeze of orange and served alongside a side of Croatian pilaf.
instructions: Rinse the orzo in a fine mesh strainer and drain well.
In a medium saucepan, bring the water to a boil.
Add the orzo to the boiling water and cook until al dente.
In a separate saucepan, heat a little bit of water over medium heat.
Add the Croatian pilaf and cook according to package instructions.
In a large serving dish, combine the cooked orzo, pilaf, and smoked salmon.
Squeeze the orange juice over the top and season with salt and black pepper.
